bibliographic_info.title: Analysis of real-time kinematic positioning of UAV based on BDS-3 PPP-B2b service

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  Available online at www.sciencedirect.com ScienceDirect Advances in Space Research 77(2026)232–245 www.elsevier.com/locate/asr Analysis of real-time kinematic positioning of UAV based on BDS-3 PPP-B2b service Zihao Liua , Yifei Lva,b,c,⁎ , Guo Chend, Lewen Zhaoa,b,c , Feixiang Weie , Yuanjin Pana,b,c a School of Remote Sensing and Geomatics Engineering, Nanjing University of Info
The three-dimensional (3D) orbit accuracy of PPP- B2b product is improved by 16.7 % compared to the broadcast orbits.
